name: hallucination-rag
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system with **real-time hallucination detection** that automatically validates LLM-generated answers by comparing them against retrieved web content. When hallucination is detected, the system automatically provides corrected answers with source links.

scripts.sql: echo '' && echo '🗄  SQL Browser UI  →  http://localhost:8888' && echo '   (Server: db  |  User: root  |  DB: rag_app)' && echo '' && docker compose exec db mysql -uroot -pRoot@1234 rag_app
